caption: A group of men are gathered outdoors in front of a building, as seen in a sequence of frames from a news report. A man in a light blue button-down shirt stands centrally, gesturing with his hand while speaking to another man wearing a white shirt. Other men stand nearby, including one older man in a white shirt and glasses on the left. The scene remains static across the frames, with only slight shifts in the men's postures. The video is overlaid with news graphics from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". A red banner at the top reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", while a red banner at the bottom states "BJP से डॉ. प्रेम कुमार नीतीश सरकार में मंत्री बने". On the left, text identifies "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and on the right, labels name "विजेंद्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार" as "मंत्री". A timestamp in the bottom right reads "10:03 PM".
